label: SES-134 / CNV-036 close-out — PI-112 build closure (governance & delivery model migration). Ingests the 12 phase commits (Project rename WS->PRJ, two-tier areas, Planning Item lifecycle, Workstream+Work Task entities), resolves PI-112, consumes WT-063. No new decisions (DEC-340..349 recorded earlier). Belongs to Project PRJ-014. Identifiers re-verify at apply; re-key on collision.

session.session_title: PI-112 build closure — governance & delivery model migration
session.session_executive_summary: The build-closure session for PI-112, the governance & delivery model migration. It renamed the long-running container entity Workstream to Project (WS-->PRJ-), restructured Areas into a fixed System tier (with layer ranks) plus per-engagement user-defined Engagement areas, gave the Planning Item a phase-agnostic six-state lifecycle, and introduced the two entities the agent-delivery model needs: the delivery-phase Workstream (WSK-) and the single-area Work Task (WTK-), relocating the area tag onto the Work Task. Each phase shipped green with a reversible Alembic migration validated on a copy of the live database, then applied to it. Dropping the redundant planning_item.area column is deferred to the shelved orchestrator's retirement, so PI-112's data-model scope is complete.
session.session_description: Single Claude Code implementation session executing migration PI-112 against the target model in governance-redesign-target-model.md v0.4, opened against WT-063. Recovered from a power failure, then ran the section-9 migration in test-green phases: 1a/1b rename workstream->Project + WS->PRJ (code + Alembic 0027 live data); 2 two-tier area model (System areas with layer ranks + per-engagement Engagement areas, migration 0028); 3 Planning Item six-state lifecycle (migration 0029); 4a delivery-phase Workstream entity WSK- (migration 0031); 4b single-area Work Task entity WTK- with the relocated area (migration 0032). A concurrent session added 0030_changelog (a Phase-1 follow-on migrating change_log workstream->project) mid-run; ours chained as 0031/0032. The planning_item.area column drop (its only reader is the shelved WS-012 orchestrator) is deferred to orchestrator retirement (target-model section 9 step 6). Full v2 suite green at each phase (2226 passed at close). No new decisions; DEC-340..349 were recorded in SES-132/SES-133.

conversation.conversation_title: Executing the PI-112 governance & delivery migration
conversation.conversation_purpose: Execute migration PI-112 (the section-9 sequence of the target model) in test-green phases and close it out.
conversation.conversation_description: Ran PI-112 phases 1a/1b (Project rename + WS->PRJ), 2 (two-tier areas + layer ranks), 3 (Planning Item six-state lifecycle), 4a (Workstream WSK-) and 4b (Work Task WTK- with relocated area). Each phase: code + reversible migration validated on a live-DB copy then applied, full suite green. planning_item.area column drop deferred to orchestrator retirement. Resolves PI-112.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-112 Phase 0 — execution plan for the governance & delivery migration
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-112 Phase 0 — execution plan for the governance & delivery migration

Opens the pi-112-migration branch with a phased, resumable execution plan
derived from governance-redesign-target-model.md v0.4 and decisions
DEC-340..349. Sequences §9 into four test-green phases (Project rename,
area restructure, PI lifecycle, Workstream+Work Task entities) plus
close-out, modeled on the PI-073 branch/phase-commit pattern.

Records verified ground truth (alembic head 0026, 168 v2 tests, green
baseline) and the Phase 1 blast-radius map.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-112 Phase 1a — rename workstream → Project, WS- → PRJ- (code + tests)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-112 Phase 1a — rename workstream → Project, WS- → PRJ- (code + tests)

DEC-341/DEC-345. Renames the long-running container entity `workstream` to
`Project` across the access/api/exporter/ui layers and updates the identifier
prefix WS- → PRJ-. The new "Workstream-as-phase" entity does not exist yet
(Phase 4), so the rename is unambiguous.

Surgical, not blanket: only entity-bearing token forms were changed (quoted
type strings, workstream_* columns, the three *_belongs_to_workstream /
workstream_planned_in_reference_book reference kinds, CamelCase Workstream*
schema classes, constraint/index names, route /workstreams → /projects).
Bare-word "workstream" prose in comments is intentionally preserved.

- model: class Project, table `projects`, PRJ-[0-9]{3} CHECK, project_* cols
- repo: workstreams.py → projects.py; _IDENTIFIER_PREFIX=PRJ, regex ^PRJ-\d{3}$
- api: routers/workstreams.py → projects.py, prefix /projects; ProjectCreateIn/
  ReplaceIn/PatchIn; _FIELD_PREFIX project_; main.py router wiring
- exporter: snapshot key workstreams → projects (file becomes projects.json)
- vocab: PROJECT_STATUSES/_TRANSITIONS; *_belongs_to_project kinds; "project"
  in ENTITY_TYPES and _kinds_for_pair clauses
- ui: panel/dialog/schema files renamed; session_create + client updated
- orchestrator (shelved, DEC-344): run.py + child kickoff template renamed
  consistently (project_identifier/project_title, *_belongs_to_project edges)
- sessions.py error code missing_project_membership_edge

Live-data migration of WS-001..014 rows + ref edges is Phase 1b (Alembic 0027).
Tests build via create_all, so this is verifiable independently: full v2 suite
2206 passed, 3 skipped, 6 xfailed (was 2193 + 13 fail; the 13 were stale WS-/
workstreams.json test literals, now PRJ-/projects.json). No new ruff findings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-112 Phase 1b — Alembic 0027 live migration workstream→Project, WS-→PRJ-
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-112 Phase 1b — Alembic 0027 live migration workstream→Project, WS-→PRJ-

DEC-341/DEC-345 live-data half. Migrates engagement DBs to the Phase 1a code:
recreates workstreams→projects (PRJ- identifier CHECK) copying rows with the
WS-NNN→PRJ-NNN rewrite; re-types and re-keys the 120 workstream-typed refs
edges and renames the three relationship kinds; rewrites the 4
workstream_master_plan reference-book-kind → project_master_plan; defensive
identifier_reservations rewrite. Fully reversible downgrade.

Validated on a copy of the live CRMBUILDER.db: upgrade → downgrade → re-upgrade
clean, schema parity with create_all confirmed, new-code list_projects reads it.
Applied to the live engagement DB (backed up first); db-export snapshots
regenerated (workstreams.json → projects.json; references/reference_books
updated). Historical WS- prose in session/decision/change_log text fields left
as-is.

Also fixes a Phase 1a bug: two model index names were half-renamed
(ix_workstreams_project_*) because the column-token replacement mangled the
index-name token before its own rule ran — now ix_projects_project_*. No test
asserts index names; create_all now matches the migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-112 Phase 2 — two-tier area model (System / Engagement), drop prefix
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-112 Phase 2 — two-tier area model (System / Engagement), drop prefix

DEC-340 (drop version prefix), DEC-342 (System/Engagement tiers), DEC-347
(layer rank), DEC-348 (engagement areas user-defined, no Domain link).

- vocab: AREAS (18 prefixed) → SYSTEM_AREA_RANKS (13, prefix dropped) with
  layer ranks (storage 1 → access 2 → api 3 → mcp/ui 4; rest None) + derived
  SYSTEM_AREAS frozenset.
- new EngagementArea model + engagement_areas table (per-engagement,
  user-defined, standalone — no FK/reference to domains per DEC-348).
- new engagement_areas repository with valid_area_names(session) = System ∪
  this engagement's Engagement areas, the single source consulted wherever an
  area is validated. planning_items + orchestration validate through it
  (session-aware, since the Engagement tier lives in the DB).
- exporter exports engagement_areas; new test_engagement_areas.py.
- migration 0028: create engagement_areas; prefix-drop existing
  planning_items.area; seed engagement areas from any cbm-* present. Validated
  upgrade/downgrade on a live-DB copy incl. the synthetic cbm-* seeding path;
  schema parity with create_all; applied to the live DB (v2-access→access);
  db-export snapshots regenerated.
- area column stays on planning_items this phase (relocation to Work Task is
  Phase 4). REST API + UI for engagement-area management deferred to
  engagement-init work. Shelved backfill_pi_083_area.py updated to System
  labels + tests across the suite updated off legacy area labels.

Full v2 suite green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-112 Phase 3 — Planning Item six-state lifecycle (DEC-346)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-112 Phase 3 — Planning Item six-state lifecycle (DEC-346)

Replaces Open/Resolved/Deferred with the phase-agnostic lifecycle:
Draft → Decomposed → Ready → In Progress → In Review → Resolved, plus the
Deferred and Cancelled terminals. Names are discipline-neutral — the phase
of work lives on the Workstream (Phase 4), not the PI status.

- vocab: PLANNING_ITEM_STATUSES (8 states) + PLANNING_ITEM_STATUS_TRANSITIONS.
  Forward progression with the three exit states (Resolved/Deferred/Cancelled)
  reachable from every active state, so a delivering close-out's `resolves`
  edge still flips a PI from any non-terminal; In Review→In Progress rework
  bounce; Deferred resume; Resolved/Cancelled terminal.
- planning_items.update enforces transitions via check_transition; create
  defaults to Draft; planning-item dialog schema default Draft.
- orchestration: ready-trigger Open → Ready (DEC-346 — the state a standing
  agent watches for).
- migration 0029: drop ck_planning_status → rewrite Open→Draft → recreate the
  8-value CHECK. Validated upgrade/downgrade on a live-DB copy; schema parity
  with create_all; applied to the live DB (55 Open → Draft); snapshots regen'd.
- test ripple: planning-item "Open" → "Draft" (orchestrator candidates →
  "Ready"), risk "Open" preserved, via context classification.

Full v2 suite green (2211 passed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

v2: PI-112 Phase 4a — Workstream (delivery-phase) entity (WSK-)

DEC-343/DEC-349. Adds the NEW Workstream governance entity: a single delivery
phase of one Planning Item (the old container was renamed Project in Phase 1,
freeing the `workstream`/Workstream naming for this). Identifier WSK-.

- vocab: WORKSTREAM_PHASE_TYPES {Design, Development, Testing, Documentation,
  Data Migration, Deployment} (Design added per DEC-349), WORKSTREAM_STATUSES
  {Planned, In Progress, Complete, Blocked} + transitions (Complete terminal,
  Blocked side-state). "workstream" re-added to ENTITY_TYPES; new kind
  workstream_belongs_to_planning_item + (workstream,workstream) blocked_by.
- model Workstream (table `workstreams`, WSK- + phase_type + status CHECKs).
- repositories/workstreams.py: lean 8-function CRUD with status transitions,
  phase-type validation, belongs_to-PI edge via inline references.
- api: routers/workstreams.py at /workstreams; Workstream{Create,Replace,Patch}In
  schemas; registered in main.py. exporter exports workstreams.
- migration 0031: create workstreams table + extend refs CHECKs (admit the
  workstream entity type + the new kind; superset, no upgrade data rewrite).
  Chained after 0030_changelog (a concurrent Phase-1 follow-on).
- tests/test_workstream_phase.py (8 cases): autoassign, phase/status validation,
  Design phase, transitions+timestamps, Blocked resume, belongs_to edge,
  collision, soft-delete/restore.

Note: chained as 0031 because a concurrent session added 0030_changelog
(change_log workstream→project, a Phase-1 gap). UI monitoring panel deferred.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-112 — fix 0030 change_log migration statement ordering; create PRJ-015
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-112 — fix 0030 change_log migration statement ordering; create PRJ-015

Migration 0030 ran the workstream→project change_log UPDATEs while the old
CHECK was still active (and recreated constraints before reversing data on
downgrade), so `alembic upgrade head` failed and any new Project create 500'd.
Reorder to drop CHECK → mutate data → recreate CHECK in both directions.
Applied to the CRMBUILDER engagement DB; regenerated db-export snapshots
(incl. PRJ-015 "UI usability improvements").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-112 Phase 4b — Work Task (single-area) entity (WTK-)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-112 Phase 4b — Work Task (single-area) entity (WTK-)

DEC-342. Adds the Work Task governance entity: the single-area unit of
execution within a Workstream (WTK- identifier), carrying the `area` field
(relocated off the Planning Item in Phase 4c) and an agent claim.

- vocab: WORK_TASK_STATUSES {Planned, Ready, Claimed, In Progress, Complete,
  Blocked, Failed} + transitions (Complete terminal; Blocked/Failed recover).
  "work_task" added to ENTITY_TYPES; new kind work_task_belongs_to_workstream
  + (work_task,work_task) blocked_by.
- model WorkTask (table `work_tasks`): WTK- + status + claim-pairing CHECKs;
  single work_task_area (validated at access layer vs System ∪ Engagement);
  claimed_by/claimed_at; status + area + deleted_at indexes.
- repositories/work_tasks.py: CRUD + area validation + status transitions +
  atomic claim/release + belongs_to-workstream edge.
- api: routers/work_tasks.py at /work-tasks (incl. claim/release);
  WorkTask{Create,Replace,Patch,Claim}In schemas; registered. exporter exports
  work_tasks.
- migration 0032: create work_tasks + extend refs CHECKs (admit work_task type
  + the new kind; superset). Validated upgrade/downgrade + schema parity on a
  live-DB copy; applied to the live DB; snapshots regenerated.
- tests/test_work_task.py (7 cases); blocked_by vocab test extended to
  work_task; exporter expected-set updated.

Full v2 suite green (2226 passed). UI monitoring panel deferred.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
